# visuals

Graphviz DOT files and rendered images. All DOT files are generated by the C++ engine via `utils.h`. Render all at once with:

```bash
bash viz/render_all.sh
# which runs: dot -Tpng <file>.dot -o <file>.png for each .dot in viz/
```

## Expected DOT files (generated by `tracenet`)

| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `species_graph.dot` | Full 16-node HGT species graph with weighted edges |
| `bfs_tree.dot` | BFS reachability tree rooted at source node |
| `scc_condensed.dot` | SCC condensation — each component collapsed to a meta-node |
| `dijkstra_path.dot` | Full graph with shortest spread path highlighted |
| `containment.dot` | Graph with greedy/B&B removed edges marked |

> Note: There are no `graphviz/` or `plots/` subdirectories. All DOT files and rendered PNGs live flat in `viz/` alongside `render_all.sh`. Heatmap and bar chart outputs from Python analysis scripts go in `analysis/`.
